sentences.arabic: كَانَ طِفْلٌ اسْمُهُ أَنَسٌ يُحِبُّ الْمُوسِيقَى كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Bio je dječak po imenu Enes koji je jako volio muziku.
sentences.translationEn: There was a boy named Anas who loved music very much.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ نَايًا قَدِيمًا فِي بَيْتِ جَدِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Pronašao je staru frulu u djedinoj kući.
sentences.translationEn: He found an old flute in his grandfather's house.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنَ الْجَدِّ أَنْ يُعَلِّمَهُ الْعَزْفَ فَقَبِلَ الْجَدُّ بِفَرَحٍ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio je djeda da ga nauči svirati i djed je radosno prihvatio.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his grandfather to teach him to play and the grandfather happily agreed.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ أَنَسٌ أَوَّلَ لَحْنٍ وَعَزَفَهُ لِأُسْرَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Enes je naučio prvu melodiju i odsvirao je svojoj porodici.
sentences.translationEn: Anas learned his first melody and played it for his family.
